programme.desc: When a former Civil War soldier saves a nun from a gang of bandits, they team up to help the Mexicans in their war against the French.

programme.title: From Here to Eternity
programme.desc: A brooding loner finds love and turmoil on the eve of the bombing of Pearl Harbor's bombings.

programme.title: Executive Decision
programme.desc: In a chillingly prescient story, 400 terrified passengers face death on a plane hijacked by terrorists. In a daring rescue attempt, an elite military unit boards the plane ... but as they hurtle toward Washington, D.C., the president must decide whether to destroy the plane or allow the heroes time to overpower the terrorists.

programme.title: The Great Escape
programme.desc: Steve McQueen jumps on his motorcycle and leads the way in this thrill-packed adventure that blends top stars, a true-life WWII saga and Hollywood's gift for storytelling into a bravura, blockbuster film.

programme.title: Legally Blonde
programme.desc: When Elle, a sorority queen, is dumped by her boyfriend as he plans to go to law school, she enrols in the same school to win him back. However, she discovers that there is more to her than her looks.

programme.title: Unfaithful
programme.desc: A middle-aged wife and mother has an affair with a handsome younger man, but her husband murders him when he finds out about the affair, and husband and wife must reckon with what happened.

programme.title: The Great Escape
programme.desc: Steve McQueen jumps on his motorcycle and leads the way in this thrill-packed adventure that blends top stars, a true-life WWII saga and Hollywood's gift for storytelling into a bravura, blockbuster film.

programme.title: Singapore Hour
programme.desc: From art trails and midnight bites to the journey of chicken rice from farm to plate, meet an artist finding home in Singapore - and explore new ways to bond with pets across the city.

programme.title: Singapore Tonight
programme.desc: From business to politics, health to technology, the latest news from Singapore and analysis of the impact.

programme.title: Insight 2026/2027
programme.desc: Insight investigates and analyses topical issues that impact Asia and the rest of the world.

programme.title: Asia Tonight
programme.desc: News and views from around the region, delivered with uniquely Asian perspectives.

programme.title: Red Snow
programme.desc: Olivia, an outstanding vampire romance novelist, longs to encounter a real vampire. Her wish comes true when Luke turns up at her remote snowbound cabin seeking for help. However, her dream transforms into a chilling nightmare on Christmas Eve when Luke's vampire companions track him down...

programme.title: Jealousy
programme.desc: Model Min is admitted to a hospital, but mysteriously falls to her death at night. Rumour has it that the hospital is haunted. Subsequently, Min's photographer begins receiving eerie phone calls, the writer loses consciousness in a bizarre car accident, and her friend mysteriously disappears…

programme.title: 3AM
programme.desc: A woman in hospital accidentally discovers her husband’s affair. On the verge of breakdown, she begins to encounter a “stranger” who claims to also be a victim of the affair. Is this entity a figment of her imagination or a vengeful spirit? As she struggles to control her thoughts and actions, can she stop herself from hurting those around her?

programme.title: The Spore
programme.desc: Global warming has awakened a malevolent spore from beneath an ancient ice field, unleashing a horrific plague that ravages humanity. Fleeing the chaos, Meadow takes refuge in an abandoned cabin. Together with other strangers, she fights to survive as some succumb to the plague, transforming into ravenous hunters who now stalk the living.

programme.title: Open the Coffin
programme.desc: Ghost Hand and his tomb raiders resurface in Jiang City to seek gold in ancient tombs after a 3-year absence. They released an evil spirit from a coffin and all four died at home eventually. Poison and pinholes in the corpses become the sole clue for police investigation. A tomb raid now unfolds as a perplexing and mysterious case.

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: Jing Wen, a struggling drama student, takes on a modelling job to help cover her tuition costs. As she becomes a model for an enigmatic artist specializing in expressive human body sketches, Jing Wen accidentally uncovers a shocking truth, plunging her into a desperate fight for survival.

Is this entity a figment of her imagination or a vengeful spirit? As she struggles to control her thoughts and actions, can she stop herself from hurting those around her?

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: Jia Hao and his friends gather to celebrate his birthday at a villa. However, the festivities take a dark turn when they connect to a deadly VR game in which they must light candles and dodge ghosts to survive. Tragedy strikes as two of his friends fall victim to the escalating horrors within, plunging them all deeper into a chilling nightmare.

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: Artiste Yin Qing enters Hell's Gate through a supernatural TV show and reunites with her late friend Mei Qi. At Mei Qi's gravesite, Yin Qing encounters Mei Qi's husband, Dong Sheng, and a series of mysterious incidents unfold. She then brings Dong Sheng onto the show, where Mei Qi exposes his infidelity and reveals the conspiracy behind her death.

programme.title: 3AM
programme.desc: The Hungry Ghost Festival is around the corner. A newcomer at a workplace offends the ghosts in his office building when he shows disrespect for the spirits on his first day at work. In the course of a night shift, the man and his colleagues working overtime experience spooky encounters that make them reflect on their behaviours and beliefs...

programme.title: 3AM
programme.desc: A taxi driver who is constantly judging others by his own standards, also reads into their every move and sets out to help ‘victims’ in his own way. When a woman he likes seems to be bullied by her son, he goes about setting things right for her, even resorting to turning himself into a cold-blooded serial killer…

programme.title: Impermanence
programme.desc: A series of strange events is happening in a peaceful village, including a corpse that is resurrected from its grave and ran away. As the villagers investigate, a villain dies and the village head also goes missing. Police investigation ensues, but as the truths start to unveil, more mysteries are unfolding. Who is the one behind them all?

programme.title: Taking the Stand (S3)
programme.desc: Skiing icon Dean Cummings is on trial for the shooting death of Guillermo Arriola, a local New Mexican rancher who was only armed with a can of mace.

programme.title: Accused: Did I Do It?
programme.desc: A day out on the river with friends ends in a deadly encounter when a man stabs five people with a pocket knife, following a terrifying confrontation.

programme.title: The First 48 (S26)
programme.desc: When a man is lured into a deadly trap, detectives must turn the tables on the suspects before they strike again.

programme.title: Lie Detector: Truth or Deception
programme.desc: Years after Gary Coleman’s controversial and tragic death, his ex-wife agrees to take a polygraph test to confront lingering suspicions and silence the rumours that she was responsible for his death.

programme.desc: Shocking first-hand accounts of people who were manipulated, abused, and finally broke free before it was too late. We'll hear from former members of Gwen Shamblin's Remnant Fellowship, and more.

programme.desc: With the help of Det. Johnson and Det Stewart, Det. Diesburg pieces together what happened one Saturday afternoon when two young men opened fire on two teens driving down the street.

programme.title: Grade 5 Science

programme.title: Grade 2 Math
programme.desc: Study how to divide whole numbers up to 1000 including money and unit fractions. Learn more about straight and curved lines, flat and curved surfaces, and basic shapes and continuous patterns using two attributes.

programme.title: Grade 2 English

programme.title: Grade 3 Math

programme.title: Grade 3 English
programme.desc: Study what are homonyms, homographs, and hyponyms. Know more about the elements of a story, how to write it, and how to compare and contrast its information, alongside learning about words, phrases, and sentences with long vowels.

programme.desc: Alamin kung paano magsuri at maghambing ng iba't ibang uri ng panitikan, kung ano ang mga estratehiya sa pagkuha ng impormasyon, paano wastong gamitin ang impormal na komunikasyon, at ang angkop na ekspresyon sa pagbabahagi ng ideya o opinyon tungkol sa mga tekstong nabasa.

programme.title: Team A S2 ep 6
programme.desc: Matapos mapatunayan nila Janet (Kim Molina) at Ian (Jerald Napoles) ang pagmamahalan at diskarte sa kani-kanilang pamilya, ano pa ang mga pagsubok na haharapin ng pamilya Ambida? Ano ang naghihintay sa paglipat nila sa bago nilang komunidad lalo pa at magtatagpo uli si Janet at Enzo (Wilbert Ross), ex boyfriend ni Janet, na tutulong din sa kanilang negosyo? Paano ito haharapin ni Ian sa gitna ng pagkawala ng trabaho?
